subcodes.first_line: O thou tree of the orchard of His Holiness Moses! The honored Áqa Habíbu'llah has arrived at the Refulgent Land, attained unto the Sacred Threshold
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شجره حدیقه حضرت کلیم جناب آقا حبیب الله بارض جلیل وارد و بتربت مقدسه مشرف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Shrines and Holy places
